footer.disclaimer: KeyShield is not a financial institution and does not provide financial services. We provide a technology platform for secure cryptocurrency exchange between parties.

home.seo_title: Crypto Escrow Service for Telegram | USDT Escrow on TRON | KeyShield
home.seo_description: KeyShield — crypto escrow service for secure USDT deals in Telegram. 2-of-3 multisig wallet on TRON, private keys only to participants. No admin can touch your funds.

hero.label: Escrow on TRON blockchain
hero.title: Trusted Crypto Escrow Service for Telegram Deals
hero.subtitle: Funds locked in a 2-of-3 multisig wallet on TRON. Two signatures required — no admin can touch your money.

what_is.title: What is a Cryptocurrency Escrow Service?
what_is.p1: A crypto escrow is a scheme where funds never go directly from buyer to seller. An independent escrow crypto service temporarily holds the money and releases it only after agreed conditions are fulfilled. This is essential for freelance work, Telegram advertising, digital goods sales, and any transaction between strangers online.
what_is.p2: In KeyShield, the cryptocurrency escrow service role is played by a multisig wallet on the TRON blockchain — not a human intermediary. Unlike a traditional bitcoin escrow service, funds are locked at a blockchain address where any transfer requires two out of three signatures. This makes every deal technically transparent, not just based on trust.

features.label: Features
features.title: Why KeyShield is the Most Secure Crypto Escrow Service on Telegram
features.multisig_desc: Each deal creates a dedicated 2-of-3 multisig wallet — the backbone of our escrow crypto system. Buyer and seller each hold a private key; KeyShield holds the third. Without two signatures, funds never move. No party, no admin, nobody can steal the deposit.
features.automation_desc: All steps of this cryptocurrency escrow service run through the Telegram bot: setting deal terms, depositing USDT, confirming work, and releasing funds. No manual transfers, no chasing payment details.
features.transparency_desc: Every operation in our crypto escrow service is recorded on the TRON blockchain. You can verify the multisig wallet address, deposit amount, and transfer history — no need to simply trust the middleman's word.
features.arbitration_desc: When disputes arise, an independent KeyShield arbitrator joins as the third signer. As with any credible bitcoin escrow service, decisions are made based on chat history and evidence — objectively and transparently.
features.low_fee_desc: Our cryptocurrency escrow services start from {{fee}} USDT per deal. Fixed rate for smaller amounts, percentage-based for larger deposits. No hidden charges — ever.
features.fast_start_desc: No registration or KYC required to use these crypto escrow services. Open the bot, describe your deal terms, and send USDT to the multisig address — that's it.

how_it_works.label: Process
how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step1_desc: The buyer or seller opens the Telegram bot and creates a secure deal: describes the service or product, the USDT amount, and the deadline.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Each participant receives their private key for signing transactions. The key is stored only with you; the service cannot see or recover it. Without private keys, the funds cannot be moved.
how_it_works.step3_desc: The buyer sends USDT to the multisig address. The funds are locked on the TRON blockchain awaiting participant signatures.
how_it_works.step4_desc: The seller completes the work or delivers the product within the agreed timeframe. All agreements are documented in the Telegram chat.
how_it_works.step5_desc: If the buyer is satisfied, both parties sign a transfer to the seller — and the USDT goes to their wallet. If the work fails, the buyer signs a refund, and the deposit is returned.
how_it_works.deadline_p1: If the deal deadline expires and there's no confirmation or dispute within 12 hours — a refund to the buyer is initiated.
how_it_works.deadline_p2: A private key is required to receive funds — the system will request it to sign the refund transaction.
how_it_works.deadline_p3: The service commission is retained regardless — it covers infrastructure costs. Please try to complete deals on time.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.standard_from: of the deal amount from 150 USDT
pricing.fixed_desc: commission for deals up to {{max}} USDT
pricing.who_pays_desc: When creating a deal, parties agree: buyer, seller, or 50/50.
pricing.no_hidden_desc: The commission covers all operational costs: wallet activation, transactions, arbitration.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Our Crypto Escrow Services
faq.q1: What exactly is a crypto escrow?
faq.a1: A crypto escrow is a neutral intermediary service that holds funds on behalf of both parties during a transaction. The money is only released when both sides confirm the deal terms have been met. KeyShield provides this as a fully automated cryptocurrency escrow service — funds are held in a multisig wallet on TRON, not in a personal account controlled by anyone.
faq.q2: How does the escrow crypto bot work on Telegram?
faq.a2: Buyer and seller create a deal through the KeyShield Telegram bot, deposit USDT, and receive their private keys. Funds lock in a multisig wallet. Moving money — whether releasing to the seller or refunding the buyer — requires two out of three signatures. This escrow crypto setup ensures nobody can act alone.
faq.q3: Does KeyShield act as a bitcoin escrow service too?
faq.a3: Currently KeyShield operates as a USDT-based cryptocurrency escrow service on the TRON blockchain. While we don't hold Bitcoin directly, our escrow bitcoin service model is identical: 2-of-3 multisig protection, transparent blockchain records, private keys held only by participants. USDT on TRON offers lower fees and faster confirmations than BTC.
faq.q4: Is KeyShield suitable for freelancers needing crypto escrow services?
faq.a4: Absolutely. KeyShield crypto escrow services are ideal for freelance orders, digital product sales, Telegram channel advertising, and any online service paid in USDT. Deal terms are fixed in the bot, funds lock in the multisig wallet, and payment is released only after both parties confirm delivery.

testimonials.title: What users say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who already make secure deals through KeyShield
testimonials.t1_text: I work with clients from different countries. I used to get scammed all the time — either work wasn't paid or money was taken and they disappeared. With KeyShield, not a single problem. Clients are calm too.
testimonials.t2_text: I sell ads on a channel with 50K subscribers. Advertisers are often new, unfamiliar. Escrow through a bot is the perfect solution: I'm sure of payment, they're sure of placement.
testimonials.t3_text: Built a website for 800 USDT. The client wanted an escrow, I suggested KeyShield. Everything went smoothly: money in multisig, delivered work — got paid. The commission is tiny.
testimonials.t4_text: Bought course access from an unknown seller. Was afraid of getting scammed. Through KeyShield everything went smoothly — funds were released only after I received the product.
testimonials.t5_text: I buy accounts and tools for work. Amounts can be large, don't want to risk it. KeyShield helps — I especially like that the keys are only with me.
testimonials.t6_text: First time using escrow ever. Thought it would be complicated — turned out easier than a regular transfer. The bot explains everything. Now all my orders go through it.

terms.seo_description: Terms of Service for KeyShield escrow service. Rules for creating deals, commissions, dispute arbitration, ban system, and liability.
terms.title: KeyShield Terms of Service
terms.s1_p1: 1.1. These Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "Terms") govern the relationship between the KeyShield Service (hereinafter referred to as "Service", "we") and users (hereinafter referred to as "User", "you") when using the secure cryptocurrency transaction platform.
terms.s1_p2: 1.2. By using the Service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with these Terms.
terms.s1_p3: 1.3. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Your continued use of the Service after changes are made constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s2_p1: 2.1. KeyShield provides a technology platform for secure cryptocurrency transactions between users using multisig (multi-signature) technology on the TRON blockchain.
terms.s2_l1: A financial institution or payment system
terms.s2_p3: 2.3. The Service creates technical conditions for secure asset exchange between users through automatic creation of multisig wallets and key management.
terms.s3_p1: 3.1. To use the Service, you must launch the KeyShield Telegram bot with the /start command.
terms.s3_l1: They have reached the age of majority in their jurisdiction
terms.s3_l3: Cryptocurrency use is legal in their jurisdiction
terms.s3_l4: They are not violating any applicable laws
terms.s3_p3: 3.3. The Service does not conduct KYC/AML procedures. The User is solely responsible for compliance with the laws of their country.
terms.s4_p1: 4.1. Any user can create a deal by choosing their role (buyer or seller).
terms.s4_p2: 4.2. When creating a deal, a multisig wallet with three keys is automatically generated:
terms.s4_l1: Buyer's key — issued to the buyer
terms.s4_l2: Seller's key — issued to the seller
terms.s4_l3: Arbitrator's key — held by the Service
terms.s4_p3: 4.3. IMPORTANT: Each participant receives their private key through the bot. The key is displayed once and automatically deleted after 60 seconds. The User MUST save the key — it will be required for signing transactions.
terms.s4_p4: 4.4. Any transaction requires 2 of 3 signatures. This means:
terms.s4_l4: The Service cannot move funds on its own
terms.s4_l5: The buyer and seller can complete the deal without the Service's involvement
terms.s4_l6: In case of a dispute, the arbitrator's participation is required
terms.s4_p6: 4.6. Each user can have only one active deal at a time.
terms.s4_p7: 4.7. Both parties must be registered with the bot (sent /start).
terms.s5_p1: 5.1. After creating a deal, the buyer must deposit funds to the multisig address within 24 hours.
terms.s5_p2: 5.2. The deposit must be made in the EXACT amount. Any excess will go to the Service's balance.
terms.s5_p3: 5.3. The deposit is IRREVERSIBLE after blockchain confirmation. A refund is possible only:
terms.s5_l1: By mutual agreement of the parties
terms.s5_l2: By the arbitrator's decision in case of a dispute
terms.s5_p4: 5.4. After the deposit is made, the funds are frozen in the multisig wallet until the deal is completed.
terms.s5_p5: 5.5. The system automatically detects deposits within 1-3 minutes after confirmation on the TRON blockchain.
terms.s6_p1: 6.1. The Service charges a commission for providing the technology platform and arbitration:
terms.s6_l1: For deals up to {{tier1Max}} USDT: fixed commission of {{tier1Fixed}} USDT
terms.s6_l2: For deals from {{tier1Max}} USDT: {{tier2Rate}}% of the deal amount
terms.s6_l3: For deals from {{tier2Max}} USDT: {{tier3Rate}}% of the deal amount
terms.s6_l4: For deals from {{tier3Max}} USDT: {{tier4Rate}}% of the deal amount
terms.s6_l6: TRON network fees for transactions (~2-3 USDT)
terms.s6_p3: 6.3. The commission is deducted by the Service when paying the seller.
terms.s6_p4: 6.4. Who pays the commission is determined by the parties when creating the deal:
terms.s6_p5: 6.5. The commission is NON-REFUNDABLE even if the deal is cancelled or funds are returned to the buyer.
terms.s6_p6: 6.6. Automatic refund upon expiration: If the deal deadline expires and no actions are taken within 12 hours (work confirmation or dispute opening), the funds are automatically returned to the buyer. The service commission is retained in full regardless of the original commission distribution agreements.
terms.s7_p1: 7.1. Either party may open a dispute if:
terms.s7_l1: The seller has not completed the work on time
terms.s7_l2: The buyer does not accept the completed work
terms.s7_l3: The parties cannot reach an agreement
terms.s7_p2: 7.2. When opening a dispute, the parties must provide evidence:
terms.s7_p3: 7.3. The arbitrator reviews the dispute within 1-3 days and makes a final decision.
terms.s7_p4: 7.4. The arbitrator's decision is FINAL and not subject to appeal.
terms.s7_p5: 7.5. After the arbitrator's decision, the funds are automatically transferred to the winning party (minus the commission).
terms.s7_p6: 7.6. The arbitrator makes decisions solely based on the evidence provided and the deal terms.
terms.s8_p1: 8.1. The Service applies an automatic ban system to protect fair users:
terms.s8_l1: {{banStreak}} dispute losses in a row = automatic ban
terms.s8_l3: An administrator can manually ban for violations
terms.s8_l5: Cannot be a participant in deals
terms.s8_l6: Current active deals are completed normally
terms.s9_p1: 9.1. The Service is provided "AS IS" without any warranties.
terms.s9_l1: Loss of funds due to user errors (wrong address, incorrect amount)
terms.s9_l7: Work not meeting the buyer's expectations
terms.s9_p3: 9.3. The Service's maximum liability is limited to the commission amount paid for a specific deal.
terms.s9_p4: 9.4. The Service is not responsible for the tax consequences of using the platform. The User is solely responsible for complying with tax legislation.
terms.s10_p1: 10.1. We use modern technologies to protect multisig wallets.
terms.s10_p2: 10.2. Users' private keys: Buyer's and seller's keys are issued directly to them through the bot and are NOT STORED on the Service's servers. After issuance, the key is deleted from the system.
terms.s10_p3: 10.3. Arbitrator's key: Stored in encrypted form in a secure database and used only for dispute resolution.
terms.s10_l1: Secure storage of their private key
terms.s10_l2: Saving the key immediately after receiving it (auto-deletion after 60 sec)
terms.s10_p5: 10.5. IMPORTANT: If you lose your private key, you lose the ability to sign transactions. Key recovery is IMPOSSIBLE. Contact support to resolve the situation through arbitration.
terms.s10_p6: 10.6. NEVER share your private keys with third parties, including Service support.
terms.s11_p1: 11.1. It is PROHIBITED to use the Service for:
terms.s11_l4: Sale of prohibited goods or services
terms.s11_p2: 11.2. Upon discovering violations, the Service may:
terms.s11_l9: Report information to law enforcement agencies
terms.s12_p1: 12.1. You may stop using the Service at any time.
terms.s12_p2: 12.2. The Service may discontinue providing services at any time with 30 days' notice.
terms.s12_p3: 12.3. All active deals at the time of Service termination will be completed normally.
terms.s14_p1: 14.1. These Terms are governed by legislation applicable to decentralized technologies.
terms.s14_p2: 14.2. All disputes are resolved through negotiation. If an agreement cannot be reached — in accordance with the Service's arbitration procedure.
terms.s15_p1: 15.1. If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, the remaining provisions remain in force.
terms.s15_p2: 15.2. The Service's inaction in case of a Terms violation does not constitute a waiver of the right to demand compliance in the future.
terms.s15_p3: 15.3. By using the Service, you confirm that you have read and understood these Terms of Service and agree to comply with them.

privacy.s6_p3: 6.3. The Service cannot control or delete information recorded on the blockchain.

privacy.s7_l9: Information on the blockchain cannot be deleted

privacy.s8_p1: 8.1. Our website uses minimal tracking technologies.
privacy.s8_p2: 8.2. We use localStorage to store admin panel login information.
privacy.s8_p3: 8.3. We do NOT use cookies for third-party advertising or analytics.
privacy.s9_p1: 9.1. The Service is not intended for persons under 18 years of age.
privacy.s9_p2: 9.2. We do not knowingly collect information from persons under 18.
privacy.s9_p3: 9.3. If you become aware that a minor is using the Service, contact us: @keyshield_support
privacy.s10_p1: 10.1. Your data may be processed on servers located in different countries.
privacy.s10_p2: 10.2. We take measures to ensure an adequate level of data protection regardless of location.
privacy.s10_p3: 10.3. By using the Service, you consent to such data transfers.
privacy.s11_p1: 11.1. We apply the following security measures:
privacy.s11_l1: Encryption of private keys in the database
privacy.s11_p2: 11.2. However, remember that no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.s12_p1: 12.1. In the event of a personal data breach, we commit to:
privacy.s12_l1: Immediately taking measures to address the breach
privacy.s12_l3: Reporting to relevant authorities (if required by law)
privacy.s12_l4: Providing recommendations for protecting your data
privacy.s13_p1: 13.1. We reserve the right to modify this Policy at any time.
privacy.s13_p2: 13.2. We will notify you of significant changes through the bot or on the website.
privacy.s13_p3: 13.3. The date of the last update is indicated at the beginning of the document.
privacy.s13_p4: 13.4. By continuing to use the Service after changes, you agree to the new version of the Policy.
privacy.s14_p1: 14.1. We use automated data processing for:
privacy.s14_l3: Application of the ban system (3 consecutive losses)
privacy.s14_p2: 14.2. Decisions significantly affecting your rights (ban, dispute resolution) can be appealed to the administrator.
privacy.s15_p1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us:
privacy.s16_p1: 16.1. This Policy has been developed with regard to general principles of personal data protection.
privacy.s16_p2: 16.2. Depending on your jurisdiction, additional rights and obligations may apply.
privacy.s16_p3: 16.3. If the provisions of the Policy conflict with the applicable legislation of your country, the provisions of that legislation shall apply.

offer.s14_p1: 14.1. This Offer takes effect from the moment of its publication and is valid indefinitely.
offer.s14_p2: 14.2. The invalidity of individual provisions does not invalidate the Offer as a whole.
offer.s14_p3: 14.3. All appendices to this Offer (Terms of Service, Privacy Policy) are an integral part thereof.
offer.s16_p1: By sending the /start command to the KeyShield bot or using any Service function, you confirm that:
offer.s16_l1: You have read and understood all terms of this Offer
offer.s16_l2: You agree to the payment terms and commissions
offer.s16_l3: You understand the risks associated with cryptocurrency transactions
offer.s16_l4: You have reached the age of majority in your jurisdiction
offer.s16_l5: Cryptocurrency use is legal in your country
